biological_replicate: seeds of L. mutabilis “Tarwi” were collected in Huamachuco
technical_replicate: a triplicate assay was conducted under the optimal conditions.
experimental_design: Sequential hydrolysis was carried out using the PC7 protease and alcalase...
factor_value: The CCD was applied to optimize both the DH and antioxidant activity of HAP by determining the optimal E/S ratio and hydrolysis time.
number_of_fractions: TFF was employed as an alternative to isoelectric precipitation for AF isolation.
